function.rulebook_notes: Completed required bootstrap, inspected 99_system per root rulebook, then followed nested finance and purchases rulebooks before reading purchase records. Kept answer exact and auditable.
function.outcome_justification: The referenced bill 50_finance/purchases/2026_03_06__eur_000022__bill__house_mesh_esp32_topup.md shows relay modules quantity 1 at unit_eur 6 and counterparty 深圳市海云电子 with total_eur 22. Searching that counterparty in purchases returned two records total; the other, 50_finance/purchases/2025_12_04__eur_000044__bill__house_mesh_esp32_order.md, has total_eur 44 for the same counterparty. Summing the two paid amounts gives 66.
